add_params.name: tenantFilter
add_params.description: Tenant domain. PS1 reads $UserObj.tenantFilter and falls back to $UserObj.tenantId.

add_params.name: groupId
add_params.description: Group ID string. PS1 reads $UserObj.groupId.value ?? $UserObj.groupId.

add_params.name: groupType
add_params.description: Group type string e.g. 'Microsoft 365', 'Security', 'Distribution List', 'Mail-Enabled Security'. PS1 reads $UserObj.groupId.addedFields.groupType ?? $UserObj.groupType.

add_params.name: displayName
add_params.description: New display name. PS1 reads as groupName ?? displayName ?? groupId.addedFields.groupName.

add_params.name: membershipRules
add_params.description: Dynamic membership rule expression. Only used for DynamicMembership groups.

add_params.name: securityEnabled
add_params.description: Only sent if changed from initial value (customDataformatter deletes unchanged properties).

add_params.name: visibility
add_params.description: 'Public'|'Private'. Only sent if changed from initial value.

add_params.name: allowExternal
add_params.description: Allow external senders. Only sent if changed.

add_params.name: sendCopies
add_params.description: Send copies to member inboxes (M365 groups). Only sent if changed.

add_params.name: hideFromOutlookClients
add_params.description: Hide group from Outlook (M365 groups). Only sent if changed.

add_params.name: mail
add_params.description: Group email address; used for ExO DL operations.

add_params.name: AddMember
add_params.description: Array of user objects to add as members [{value: id, addedFields: {userPrincipalName, displayName, id}}].

add_params.name: RemoveMember
add_params.description: Array of user objects to remove [{value: id, addedFields: {userPrincipalName}}].

add_params.name: AddOwner
add_params.description: Array of user objects to add as owners.

add_params.name: RemoveOwner
add_params.description: Array of user objects to remove from owners.

add_params.name: AddContact
add_params.description: Array of contact objects to add [{value: email/guid, addedFields: {id, displayName, WindowsEmailAddress}}].

add_params.name: RemoveContact
add_params.description: Array of contact objects to remove [{value: mail/guid, addedFields: {id}}].

add_params.name: groupId.addedFields.groupName
add_params.description: Body parameter from PS1: groupId.addedFields.groupName

add_params.name: groupName
add_params.description: Body parameter from PS1: groupName

add_params.name: groupId.value
add_params.description: Body parameter from PS1: groupId.value

add_params.name: tenantId
add_params.description: Body parameter from PS1: tenantId

add_params.name: groupId.addedFields.groupType
add_params.description: Body parameter from PS1: groupId.addedFields.groupType

notes: customDataformatter spreads all form values into cleanedData, then deletes 5 properties (allowExternal, sendCopies, hideFromOutlookClients, securityEnabled, visibility) if they equal their initial loaded values — effectively only sending changes for those boolean/visibility fields. All other fields pass through unchanged. The formatter also processes dynamicRules: for dynamic groups, rule property/operator objects are unwrapped to their .value strings. PS1 reads all fields directly. Note: PS1 reads groupId.value ?? groupId and groupId.addedFields.groupType ?? groupType, so either nested or flat format is accepted.
x_cipp_warnings: customDataformatter is present on the CippFormPage for this endpoint. Form field names and/or types may be renamed or restructured before POST. Verify the transformer function in the frontend page file and correct param names/types accordingly.
